subject: Re: YHG Grand Opening
body:
me +3 yes

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>

Sent: Saturday, February 24, 2007 2:07:08 PM
Subject: FW: YHG Grand Opening


Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein


-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Saturday, February 24, 2007 12:13 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: YHG Grand Opening

I need to know how many people you intend to bring to the event. I want
to make sure you are properly tended to. Also, how do you intend to
arrive and will you have a boat in the marina?
--------------------------
Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld
